_comment: plate_corners_px = tight bounding box of the 9-well block only (not the whole plastic cassette). TL/BR define the grid the bilinear formula interpolates across.

strip_layout.note: Bottom row: grey(col0), white(col2 — cols 1+2 merged visually), orange(col3). Col1 bottom skipped.

notes: Reference exemplar. Even diffuse light, sharp, no significant glare. Use as the gold-standard positive.
